title: Small Mini Green Vintage Glass Bottles with Corks, Mini Vases, Decorative, Potion, Assorted Design Set of 12 pcs, 4.6 Inch Tall (11.43cm), 1.4 Inch Wide (3.56cm)
description:
About this item
Perfect Accessory for your Home Decor: 12 Pcs Glass Bottles. Bottle mouth diameter: 0.45 inch (1.14cm), bottle height(Without Cork): 4.6 inch (11.43cm), bottom diameter: 1.4 inch (3.56cm).
Beautiful Assortment of Shape and Styles: Each bottle is uniquely designed. Giving you a beautiful assortment of shapes and styles, reminiscent of antique apothecary bottles and kitchen spice jars. . Made of high quality antique styled glass. Very sturdy and hard to break. Last long time
101 Use In Homes: Small vases, sand holder, message bottles, wedding favors, medicine jars, mini treasures holder, table decor, DIY projects, restaurants and small offices decorations, tree bottles, decorative wine bottles, shot bottles, liquor bottles, witch jars, perfume bottles, Christmas Gift, Halloween, Valentines Day etc.
Secure Packaging: Packed in 6x5x5 inches box with protective box layer inside the box to protect bottles in addition to top and bottom glass protective foam. Proven successful by package testing lab.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
I love these colored glass bottles. They have a great combination of different styles and don't look cheap, which is important for I make retail items from them. They are definitely a value for your money.I put these bottles on a metal bottle tree in my front yard. They came very well packaged and the size of the bottles worked perfectWe did sand art in some. Designs are nice. Like that they are not big.Play Video
Let me start with that I am very impressed by the quality of these. They are all unique and have their own designs and shapes. The cork fits perfectly in each one. The glass is heavy and seems substantial. However I ordered clear- the box is labeled as ‘clear’ but The glass inside is green. This isn’t a huge deal to me as I am using them for a cosplay and I’ll make it work- I just want the seller to be aware that they may have issues with customers down the line if the wrong colors are being labeled. Still giving 5 stars for quality.I am so glad I purchased these. They’re small but beautiful; no two bottles are exactly alike. Will definitely repurchase!Play Video
These were just what I was hoping for! The perfect size and very cute shapes! I’m going to use to make vanilla. They should work perfectly and be very cute for gifts! Any extras will make for cute flower bud vases! They came wrapped carefully and arrived on time.Bellas y muy cute si te quieres destacar con su productoThese bottles are really pretty, but the neck is so small that it took me a longer time than I wanted to make what I was trying to make. I made it anyways, but it took about twice as long.They are 100 percent what I was looking for.i will be buying the two other colors they have to offer. Little pricey for my budget but they are exactly what I have been searching for for my spell boxes .happy 😊These are even better than advertised. Every bottle is quite a bit different for a very unique collection of small, well crafted, vintage bottles. Extremely well packaged. I really could not believe how much I loved these. Well done!
reviews_1s:
Very cheap, very unsteady- topples over.

Tricked once again by good pictures on Amazon!My product came broken and I only got seven of the 12 bottles. Then later on the table was moved and one fell and broke not your guys fault but still very saddening.The bottles are just what I wanted; however, there were only 10 bottles and 9 corks -- certainly not the 12 corked bottles I thought I was buyingThese bottles are tiny. Bought larger ones at dollar tree that worked way better.Too small like a toy to appreciate it. Too small to use as ornamentalArrived smashed into a thousand pieces.Not worth the money at all! These are extremely small. I don't even know what you would use them for.
